calendar.matters:
Notice Of Demurrer Of Deft Garrett B. Robinson To Complaint Of Pltf Us National Bank Association, As Trustee For Wfmbs 2006-Ar2; Demurrer; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NO APPEARANCE MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, GARRETT B. ROBINSON
PHILIP T. KILDUFF, ESQ., SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, U.S. BANK ASSOCIATION, (415)673-0368

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GARRETT B. ROBINSON'S Demurrer To Complaint Of Plaintiff US National Bank Association, As Trustee For WFMBS 2006-AR2 is sustained with 5 days leave to amend. No timely opposition filed and no courtesy copies of late opposition provided as required by Local Rule 2.6(b). Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
